action.proof_term:
intro N k hkn
  have hiff : ∀ N' k' p : ℕ, k' ≤ 2520 * N' → p ∣ 2520 →
      (p ∣ 2520 * N' - k' ↔ p ∣ k') := by
    intro N' k' p hkn' hp'
    have hbase : p ∣ 2520 * N' := Dvd.dvd.mul_right hp' N'
    constructor
    · intro hshift
      have h := Nat.dvd_sub hbase hshift
      rwa [show 2520 * N' - (2520 * N' - k') = k' by omega] at h
    · intro hk'
      exact Nat.dvd_sub hbase hk'
  apply Nat.dvd_antisymm
  · apply Nat.dvd_gcd
    · exact (hiff N k (Nat.gcd (2520 * N - k) 2520)
        hkn (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _)).mp (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _)
    · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _
  · apply Nat.dvd_gcd
    · exact (hiff N k (Nat.gcd k 2520)
        hkn (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _)).mpr (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _)
    · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _

intro N k hkn
  have hiff : ∀ N' k' p : ℕ, k' ≤ 2520 * N' → p ∣ 2520 →
      (p ∣ 2520 * N' - k' ↔ p ∣ k') := by
    intro N' k' p hkn' hp'
    have hbase : p ∣ 2520 * N' := Dvd.dvd.mul_right hp' N'
    constructor
    · intro hshift
      have h := Nat.dvd_sub hbase hshift
      rwa [show 2520 * N' - (2520 * N' - k') = k' by omega] at h
    · intro hk'
      exact Nat.dvd_sub hbase hk'
  apply Nat.dvd_antisymm
  · apply Nat.dvd_gcd
    · exact (hiff N k (Nat.gcd (2520 * N - k) 2520)
        hkn (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _)).mp (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _)
    · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _
  · apply Nat.dvd_gcd
    · exact (hiff N k (Nat.gcd k 2520)
        hkn (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _)).mpr (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _)
    · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _

info.lean_statement:
∀ N k : ℕ, k ≤ 2520 * N →
      Nat.gcd (2520 * N - k) 2520 = Nat.gcd k 2520

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
